allow: Bash(AWS_PROFILE=accesly-dev aws dynamodb scan --table-name accesly-dev-recovery-otps --region us-east-1 --query "Items[].{emailHash:emailHash.S,ttl:ttl.N,createdAt:createdAt.N,attempts:attempts.N}" --output table)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=accesly-dev MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 aws logs tail "/aws/lambda/accesly-dev-recovery-otp" --since 5m --region us-east-1)
